title: A Bioconductor workflow for processing and analysing spatial proteomics data.
author: Breckels LM Mulvey CM Lilley KS Gatto L
content: S-EPMC6053703 PMC6053703 A Bioconductor workflow for processing and analysing spatial proteomics data. Spatial proteomics is the systematic study of protein sub-cellular localisation. In this workflow, we describe the analysis of a typical quantitative mass spectrometry-based spatial proteomics
